touches.ai_summary: Lisa Murphy submitted an inbound demo request via the website, expressing interest in improving pipeline visibility for their sales team.

Initial qualification call with Lisa Murphy to understand NimbusNetworks' current sales challenges. Lisa described struggles with manual reporting and lack of real-time pipeline insights across their 11-person sales team.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your interest in a new sales platform right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our team wastes hours each week on manual pipeline updates and we have no automated forecasting

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with Shopify and our eCommerce stack?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major eCommerce platforms including Shopify

touches.ai_summary: Detailed qualification call covering NimbusNetworks' sales process, team structure, and specific automation needs. Lisa confirmed budget authority and timeline for Q2 implementation.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current sales workflow from lead to close
questions_asked.answer: We have a 30-45 day cycle, mostly inbound leads, but tracking deal health is completely manual

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Emma Okafor, our COO, will need to sign off, and Tariq from our account management team should evaluate the technical side

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers are fully onboarded within 2-3 weeks with our unlimited automation tier

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call to clarify technical requirements and discuss pricing tiers. Lisa confirmed 11 seats needed and expressed strong interest in unlimited automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What's the difference between your automation tiers?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited automation includes custom workflows, advanced reporting, and API access versus basic tier limits

questions_asked.question: Are you evaluating any other platforms currently?
questions_asked.answer: Not actively—we did a vendor review last quarter but nothing fit our needs

touches.ai_summary: Brief check-in call before scheduled discovery session. Lisa confirmed stakeholder availability and shared updated requirements document.

questions_asked.question: Any changes to the agenda or attendees for tomorrow's discovery call?
questions_asked.answer: All set—just want to make sure we cover custom pipeline stages in detail

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive discovery call with Lisa covering current pain points, desired outcomes, and success metrics. Discussed pipeline visibility gaps, forecasting accuracy goals, and team adoption concerns. Lisa shared detailed workflow requirements and confirmed Q2 implementation target.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like for this project in 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: Real-time pipeline visibility, 90%+ forecast accuracy, and our team spending 10+ hours less per week on manual reporting

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest concern about implementing a new platform?
questions_asked.answer: User adoption—our team is busy and any friction in the workflow will kill engagement

questions_asked.question: Can we customize pipeline stages to match our unique sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely—unlimited automation tier includes fully customizable pipelines and stage criteria

objections: Want to ensure the learning curve isn't too steep for the team

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled technical evaluation with Tariq Schneider was rescheduled due to a customer escalation on his end.

In-depth technical evaluation with Tariq covering API capabilities, data migration, integration architecture, and security requirements. Tariq tested sandbox environment and validated automation workflows against their current process. Positive feedback on ease of configuration.

questions_asked.question: How does data migration work from our existing CRM?
questions_asked.answer: We provide automated migration tools and a dedicated onboarding specialist to ensure clean data transfer

questions_asked.question: Can we build custom API integrations with our internal tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes—unlimited tier includes full REST API access and webhook support

questions_asked.question: Any technical blockers or concerns from your evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: None—the platform is more flexible than I expected, especially for custom workflows

questions_asked.question: What's your uptime SLA and security certification status?
questions_asked.answer: 99.9% uptime SLA with SOC 2 Type II and GDPR compliance

next_steps: Tariq to share technical evaluation summary with Emma

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Lisa covering pricing, contract terms, and implementation timeline. Discussed 11-seat unlimited automation plan at $10,800 ACV. Lisa confirmed budget alignment and next step of exec review with Emma.

questions_asked.question: Does the pricing align with your approved budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes—we budgeted for this initiative in Q2 and the ROI is clear based on time savings alone

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on annual versus monthly billing?
questions_asked.answer: We offer both—annual provides a 15% discount and includes priority support

questions_asked.question: What does the onboarding process look like?
questions_asked.answer: Two-week structured onboarding with dedicated specialist, training sessions, and custom workflow setup

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Emma Okafor (COO) to review strategic fit, ROI projections, and organizational impact. Emma validated business case and asked detailed questions about scalability and long-term partnership. Strong executive sponsorship confirmed.

questions_asked.question: How does this platform support our growth from 11 to 20+ sales reps over the next 18 months?
questions_asked.answer: Pricing scales linearly per seat and unlimited automation tier removes workflow complexity as you grow

questions_asked.question: What's most important to you in selecting a sales platform partner?
questions_asked.answer: Long-term reliability, responsive support, and proven ROI—we can't afford another tool that doesn't stick

questions_asked.question: What does your product roadmap look like for AI-powered forecasting?
questions_asked.answer: AI forecasting launches Q3 2026, included in unlimited tier at no additional cost

questions_asked.question: Are there any concerns or open questions before moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: Just want to finalize contract terms and make sure implementation timing aligns with our Q2 goals

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Lisa with formal proposal document, updated pricing summary, and implementation timeline. Requested contract review meeting for next week.

questions_asked.question: Can you clarify the renewal terms and auto-renewal policy?
questions_asked.answer: Annual contract with 60-day notice required for non-renewal, auto-renews at current rate

touches.ai_summary: Check-in email with Lisa to answer contract questions and confirm internal review progress. Lisa indicated legal is reviewing terms and expects feedback by end of week.

Proposal discussion call with Lisa to address legal feedback on contract terms. Covered data privacy clauses, termination conditions, and SLA commitments. Lisa confirmed internal alignment pending minor contract adjustments.

questions_asked.question: Can we add a custom data retention clause to align with our compliance requirements?
questions_asked.answer: Yes—we can accommodate that as a standard contract addendum

questions_asked.question: Are there any other terms your legal team flagged?
questions_asked.answer: Just liability cap clarification—nothing that should block us from moving forward

next_steps: Send updated contract with legal revisions

touches.ai_summary: Email to Lisa with revised contract reflecting legal feedback. Confirmed all requested terms incorporated and requested final review before signature.
Negotiation call with Lisa to finalize payment terms and implementation start date. Discussed invoice timing and confirmed May 1 onboarding kickoff.

questions_asked.question: Can we split the annual payment into two installments instead of upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We typically require annual upfront, but can offer quarterly billing at a 5% premium

questions_asked.question: Does annual upfront work within your procurement process?
questions_asked.answer: Let me check with finance—we prefer annual if the business case supports it, which it does

objections: Finance initially preferred quarterly billing option
next_steps: Confirm annual payment approval from finance

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call with Lisa to confirm annual payment approval and contract signature timeline. Lisa confirmed finance approved annual upfront payment and she's ready to execute contract pending final Emma sign-off.

questions_asked.question: What's the timeline for getting Emma's final signature?
questions_asked.answer: She's reviewing today—expecting signature by end of week

questions_asked.question: Can we confirm the onboarding team assignment and kickoff agenda?
questions_asked.answer: Yes—I'll introduce your onboarding specialist tomorrow and share the detailed kickoff plan

questions_asked.question: Anything else we need to address before signature?
questions_asked.answer: No—we're all set pending Emma's final approval
